title: Sketched-Isotropic-Gaussian Regularizer (SIGReg)
wikilinks: LeWorldModel: Stable End-to-End Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture from Pixels
summary: SIGReg is a regularization method that enforces latent embeddings to follow an isotropic Gaussian distribution, preventing representation collapse in models like LeWorldModel. It operates by projecting embeddings onto multiple random dir...
